rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code residence homestead exemption amount. Elec. Code §84.003 governs witness signatures on early voting ballot applications. The two provisions are unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 84.003. SIGNING APPLICATION BY WITNESS; ASSISTING APPLICANT.
_note: No overlap between proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase and Elec. Code §84.003 early voting ballot witness rules.
